tasks.label: 🤖 Copilot CLI: Install/Update
args: if (-not (Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Write-Error 'winget is required to install GitHub Copilot CLI on Windows.'; exit 1 }; winget install --id GitHub.Copilot -e --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements

tasks.label: 🤖 Copilot CLI: Launch (Experimental)
args: $copilot = Get-Command copilot -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($copilot) { copilot --experimental } else { npx -y @github/copilot --experimental }

tasks.label: 📊 Collect CPU Trace (dotnet-trace)
args: Write-Host 'CPU trace collection: Start the app, then run this task. Traces will be saved to ./traces/'; if (-not (Test-Path ./traces)) { mkdir ./traces }; dotnet trace collect --process-id (Get-Process WileyWidget.WinForms -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Id) -o ./traces/cpu-$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss').nettrace 2>&1 | Out-Default

tasks.label: 💾 Capture Process Dump (dotnet-dump)
args: $pid = (Get-Process WileyWidget.WinForms -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Id); if ($pid) { Write-Host \"Capturing dump for PID $pid\"; if (-not (Test-Path ./dumps)) { mkdir ./dumps }; dotnet dump collect -p $pid -o ./dumps/dump-$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss').dmp; Write-Host 'Dump saved to ./dumps/' } else { Write-Host 'WileyWidget.WinForms process not found' }

tasks.label: 🧠 Monitor Memory & GC (dotnet-counters)
args: $pid = (Get-Process WileyWidget.WinForms -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Id); if ($pid) { Write-Host \"Monitoring PID $pid. Press Ctrl+C to stop.\"; dotnet counters monitor -p $pid --counters System.Runtime,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Hosting } else { Write-Host 'WileyWidget.WinForms process not found' }

tasks.label: 📈 Collect Heap Dump (dotnet-gcdump)
args: $pid = (Get-Process WileyWidget.WinForms -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Id); if ($pid) { Write-Host \"Collecting GC heap dump for PID $pid\"; if (-not (Test-Path ./heapdumps)) { mkdir ./heapdumps }; dotnet gcdump collect -p $pid -o ./heapdumps/heap-$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss').gcdump; Write-Host 'Heap dump saved to ./heapdumps/' } else { Write-Host 'WileyWidget.WinForms process not found' }

tasks.label: 🧪 Test MSSQL Connection
args: $cs = $env:MSSQL_CONNECTION_STRING; if (-not $cs) { Write-Host '❌ MSSQL_CONNECTION_STRING not set. Run setup task first.' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 } else { Write-Host '✅ MSSQL_CONNECTION_STRING is set' -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host \"Connection: $cs\" -ForegroundColor Gray }

tasks.label: 📂 Open WarRoom Test Logs
args: $logDir = '${workspaceFolder}/tools/WileyWidget.Paneltest/Logs'; if (Test-Path $logDir) { open $logDir; Write-Host 'Opened: ' $logDir } else { Write-Host 'Log directory not found: ' $logDir }

tasks.label: 📊 Open WarRoom Test Results
args: $resultsFile = '${workspaceFolder}/tools/WileyWidget.Paneltest/Results/test-results.json'; if (Test-Path $resultsFile) { code $resultsFile } else { Write-Host 'Results file not found: ' $resultsFile }

tasks.label: test: panel registry proof (incremental)
tasks.detail: Incremental WinForms test-project build, then no-build panel registry proof run.

tasks.label: test: panel registry proof - recommended monthly charge (incremental)
tasks.detail: Incremental WinForms test-project build, then no-build run of the dedicated Recommended Monthly Charge proof test.

tasks.label: test: panel registry shell smoke (incremental)
tasks.detail: Incremental WinForms test-project build, then no-build shell smoke run.

tasks.label: temp: panel registry smoke with hang guard
temp: panel registry smoke with hang guard rerun
temp: panel registry smoke args no-build
temp: quickbooks desktop import tests rerun
temp: playwright browser-depth recalculation
args: break-even recalculates cards|rates panel updates the current-rate KPI|scenario planner updates derived totals

tasks.label: 🔬 Collect Exception Trace (Live)
args: $pid = (Get-Process -Name WileyCoWeb.Api -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Id); if ($pid) { Write-Host 'Collecting exception trace for PID' $pid; if (-not (Test-Path ./traces)) { mkdir ./traces }; dotnet trace collect --process-id $pid --providers Microsoft-Windows-DotNETRuntime:0x8000:5 --output ./traces/exceptions-$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss').nettrace --duration 00:05:00 } else { Write-Host 'WileyCoWeb.Api process not found. Start the API first.' }

tasks.label: 💾 Auto-Dump on Exception
args: $processName = 'WileyCoWeb.Api'; Write-Host 'Monitoring' $processName 'for exceptions...'; if (-not (Test-Path ./dumps)) { mkdir ./dumps }; while ($true) { $proc = Get-Process -Name $processName -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($proc) { $counters = (dotnet counters monitor -p $proc.Id --counters System.Runtime[exception-count] --format json 2>&1 | Out-String); if ($counters -match '"exception-count":\s*(\d+)' -and [int]$matches[1] -gt 0) { Write-Host 'Exception detected! Capturing dump...'; dotnet dump collect -p $proc.Id -o ./dumps/exception-dump-$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss').dmp; Write-Host 'Dump saved to ./dumps/'; break } } Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }
